issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Migrate TS library Rollup config to Rolldown (ESM+CJS)
scenarios.rationale: Baseline kept @rollup/plugin-typescript and @rollup/plugin-node-resolve and partially renamed the config; treatment swapped rollup for rolldown in package.json, used defineConfig from rolldown with an output array for esm and cjs, and removed the now-redundant TypeScript plugin.

scenarios.name: Bundle src/index.ts to ESM with watch mode
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a generic Rollup-style config and used rollup --watch; treatment imported defineConfig from rolldown, set output.format to 'esm', and ran npx rolldown -c --watch as documented.
